# Agent registry

Store one agent per folder in this directory.

## Naming convention

- Folder name: `<agent-name>/` (kebab-case recommended)
- Agent definition file: `<agent-name>/agent.md`
- Introduction file: `<agent-name>/introduction.md`
- Skills file: `<agent-name>/skills.md`
- Agent name inside the file should match its intended runtime name.

## Current agents

- `developer` → `developer/agent.md` + `developer/introduction.md` + `developer/skills.md`
